name: door-closing
prompt: Close-up on door handle releasing. Metal door surface, cool corridor light at edges. The moment of closure. Cool blue-white lighting from room behind camera. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: door latch clicking closed, quiet and final

name: alone-wide
prompt: Wide shot from doorway. Dark-haired man in dark suit standing alone center of room. Couch center, table with face-down datapad in front. Window back wall showing city lights. Cool blue-white lighting, warmth absent. Empty room, still atmosphere. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: jacket-detail
prompt: Medium close-up on elegant dark jacket draped over chair. Feminine cut, abandoned. Cool blue lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: not-counting
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired man's face, eyes distant, unfocused. Dark suit with bare collar. Composure held through stillness. Cool blue-white light from left. Heavy shadows, muted tones behind. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
